productDisplayName: Nike Men's Total90 Exact White Shoe
description: Get ready to score goals with the nike Total90 Exacto III. With sleek styling and high performance features, these shoes play as hard as you do on the football field.Upper Teijin synthetic leather upper for lightweight comfort Instep shot pods and swerve texture to provide ball control and kicking accuracy Assymetric lacing for snug Fit Die-cut EVA sockliner to reduce stud pressure Stitch detailing for more structure Lightly padded collar for comfort Appliqued swoosh logo on the side Midsole Durable and stable injected Phylon midsole for lightweight feel and cushioned comfort Heel cup for structure and snug fit, locking the backfoot in place Outsole TPU firm ground outsole with optimized stud placement for traction and structural reinforcement for stability Wash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
